# Standard Iv Duties To Employers

> Apply Standard IV (Duties to Employers) — Loyalty, Additional Compensation Arrangements, and Responsibilities of Supervisors — to employment and managerial situations

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ethics · standard-iv · duties-to-employer · supervisor-responsibility · cfa-level-1

## What this does

Apply Standard IV (Duties to Employers) — Loyalty, Additional Compensation Arrangements, and Responsibilities of Supervisors — to employment and managerial situations

Specifies 2 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **case_id** *(text, required)* — Case identifier
- **substandard** *(select, required)* — iv_a | iv_b | iv_c

## What must be true

- **iv_a_loyalty → rule:** Act for benefit of employer; do not deprive employer of advantage of skills and abilities; no confidential info disclosure
- **iv_a_loyalty → whistleblowing_exception:** May disclose to authorities when employer violations harm clients or market
- **iv_a_loyalty → leaving_employer:** No solicitation of clients until departure; no taking of files or client lists
- **iv_b_additional_compensation → rule:** Disclose in writing all additional compensation arrangements that may create conflict
- **iv_b_additional_compensation → consent_required:** Obtain written consent from employer
- **iv_c_supervisor_responsibilities → rule:** Make reasonable efforts to detect and prevent violations by those under supervision
- **iv_c_supervisor_responsibilities → inadequate_system:** Must decline supervisory role if compliance system inadequate
- **iv_c_supervisor_responsibilities → delegation:** Supervisor remains responsible even when delegating
- **recommended_procedures → compliance_program:** Written policies, training, monitoring, enforcement
- **recommended_procedures → investigation:** Prompt and thorough when violation suspected
- **validation → case_required:** case_id present
- **validation → valid_substandard:** substandard in [iv_a, iv_b, iv_c]

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Review Standard Iv** — when case_id exists; substandard in ["iv_a","iv_b","iv_c"], then call service; emit standard_iv.reviewed. _Why: Review conduct under Standard IV._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Invalid Substandard** — when substandard not_in ["iv_a","iv_b","iv_c"], then emit standard_iv.review_rejected. _Why: Unsupported substandard._ *(error: `STD_IV_INVALID_SUBSTANDARD`)*

## Errors it can return

- `STD_IV_INVALID_SUBSTANDARD` — substandard must be iv_a, iv_b, or iv_c

## Events

**`standard_iv.reviewed`**
  Payload: `case_id`, `substandard`, `compliant`, `recommended_action`

**`standard_iv.review_rejected`**
  Payload: `case_id`, `reason_code`

## Connects to

- **cfa-code-of-ethics** *(required)*
